_comment: Contact section data (Milestone 15, section #contact). Edit any value below to update the phone number, emails, address, hours, GPS coordinates, or social links shown on the homepage — index.html never hardcodes any of it, and assets/js/modules/contact-info.js only reads and renders whatever is in this file. The WhatsApp link is generated automatically from 'phone' (assets/js/modules/contact-info.js strips spaces/+ to build the wa.me URL) — there is no separate WhatsApp number to maintain. The Google Maps embed (Milestone 17, assets/js/modules/contact-map.js) reads this same 'address' (and 'gps' once set) — no separate map address to maintain either.
_gps_comment: Placeholder for now (no confirmed coordinates yet). assets/js/modules/contact-map.js (Milestone 17) falls back to a text search built from 'address' while this is null; set { "lat": ..., "lng": ... } here once confirmed and the map switches to pinning those exact coordinates automatically.
